title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 18–18, this part focuses on Pedro, Carrot, Big Mom as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well then ...Now that we're in big mom's shmancy castle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: It's time for me to give...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: One solo counter- attack, coming up soon!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 14 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
